false_negatives_missed_crises.text: I hope you all find peace and happiness Reading your posts over the months have at times helped me feel less alone. I hope that happiness finds its way into your lives
Any tips for not feeling numb? I'm losing myself slowly and I can't find anything to be fun anymore. I just want to be happy again. All my college friends are back. Please someone help me.

I guess I didn't take enough Last night I downed a mix of pills, benzos. Ssris, mood stabilizers, and cough meds. Guess it wasn't enough. I woke up today feeling..off. Almost like I'm not even a person I'm just going through the motions. I have literally no emotion. anyone ever experience this before?

false_positives_false_alarms.text: Please Help Me I Can't Keep Going Like This

Biding time I've been doing nothing all day and I tried to kill myself last nigh and I go to the therapist at 3 so I am fucking dreading being sent to the goddamn hospital Maybe I can find something to kill myself with at the hospital Edit: found some broken glass in the classroom, gonna go to the bathroom and slice n' dice

Hey can anyone help All i can think of nowadays is how to kill myself. I don't really want to do it but i find getting closer every day. I don't know how to cope with life. Like I'm losing my mind over small things but it feels like they are the only things that matter. I feel like when i graduate high school I'm gonna be out of my safety net and everyone's gonna know what a loser i am (never been the social kind). So I feel like I've set myself a deadline for suicide and I'm scared i actually might follow through. I feel like a chump blabbering but it feels good to write it out.
